name: Chicken and Mushrooms in a Tarragon Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into bite-sized pieces.
2. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add mushrooms and cook until browned.
3. Add chicken to the skillet and cook until no longer pink, stirring often.
4. Drain excess fat from the skillet, then discard the drippings.
5. In a separate bowl, whisk together whipping cream, flour, salt, and tarragon until smooth.
6. Gradually pour the mixture into the skillet with the chicken and mushrooms, stirring constantly.
7. Cook until thickened and bubbly, about 2-3 minutes.
8. Return the chicken and mushrooms to the skillet and cook until heated through.
9. Serve over hot cooked rice.
